title: subworkflow - aws ssm eks remediate nodegroup version
description:
Remediation subworkflow to update EKS managed nodegroup version using AWS Systems Manager automation

Parameters:

clusterName: (Required) EKS cluster name
nodegroupName: (Required) EKS managed nodegroup name
targetVersion: (Optional) Target Kubernetes version
releaseVersion: (Optional) Target EKS optimized AMI release version
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection
guide:
## Remediation: Update EKS Nodegroup Version

This subworkflow remediates outdated EKS worker node versions by running AWS-ExecuteAwsApi with eks:UpdateNodegroupVersion.

### Parameters

- clusterName (Required): EKS cluster name
- nodegroupName (Required): EKS managed nodegroup name
- targetVersion (Optional): Target Kubernetes version
- releaseVersion (Optional): Target EKS optimized AMI release version
- awsregion (Required): AWS region
- dynatraceawsconnection (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

### AWS SSM Document

Document Name: AWS-ExecuteAwsApi
API Call: eks:UpdateNodegroupVersion

### Workflow Logic

1. Start SSM automation to call EKS UpdateNodegroupVersion
2. Wait for automation completion
3. Fail if final execution status is not Success
